intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1. Run a standard Seurat workflow in R: load, QC, normalize, PCA, neighbors, clustering, UMAP, and FindAllMarkers; show me a UMAP and the top markers per cluster.

blocks.text: Good—I can see the 10x matrix triplet for GSM5746268 (barcodes, features, matrix). There are also triplets for two other samples (GSM5746269 and GSM5746270), but you asked for just the first sample. Let me now read the Seurat recipe and build a plan.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "seurat-scrna", "description": "Authoritative single-cell RNA-seq QC + clustering + cluster annotation with R/Seurat (v5).", "body": "scRNA-seq QC + clustering + annotation with R/Seurat v5 (standard PBMC3k workflow). Provision: ensure_capability('Seurat'), then library(Seurat). THE THREE CHOICES THAT DEFINE THE RESULT \u2014 surface them with present_plan before committing: (1) QC thresholds (subset cutoffs on nFeature_RNA and percent.mt); (2) number of PCs/dims (read off the ElbowPlot); (3) clustering resolution (FindClusters). Steps: ReadMtx -> CreateSeuratObject(min.cells=3,min.features=200) -> PercentageFeatureSet('^MT-') -> subset QC -> NormalizeData -> FindVariableFeatures -> ScaleData -> RunPCA -> FindNeighbors -> FindClusters -> RunUMAP -> JoinLayers -> FindAllMarkers. Load ggplot2 and dplyr explicitly; never library(tidyverse)."}

blocks.text: Perfect. Now let me present the plan with sensible defaults for a PBMC sample:

input.title: Seurat v5 workflow on GSM5746268 (PBMC sample)
input.summary: Load 10x matrix triplet, QC filter, normalize, find variable features, PCA, neighbors, Leiden clustering, UMAP, and marker detection.
input.rationale: Standard end-to-end scRNA-seq processing with modern Seurat v5 layer idioms; final outputs are UMAP plot and top markers per cluster table.
input.assumptions: <parameter name="assumption">Sample is mouse or human PBMC (or PBMC-like); mitochondrial genes are prefixed MT- (or mt- for mouse).
input.assumption: Output: UMAP colored by cluster, table of top 5 markers per cluster.
input.steps:
<parameter name="step">
    <parameter name="title">Load 10x matrix triplet (barcodes, features, matrix) and create Seurat object
input.description: JoinLayers for DE (v5 idiom); FindAllMarkers(only.pos=TRUE, min.pct=0.25, logfc.threshold=0.25); extract top 5 per cluster.
input.expected_outputs: <parameter name="expected_output">CSV table: top 5 markers per cluster (gene, avg_log2FC, p_val_adj).
